_status_note: verified_in_runner = _fetchLiveBizData and 600000ms cache interval confirmed in source. The actual freshness behavior (whether data is stale at query time) is not verified by the runner.
title: Stale hours: admin changes staff schedule but AI still answers with old hours
failing_behavior: When vendor admin changed Helen's Tuesday hours to OFF, the AI continued to say 'Helen works Tuesday from 10 AM to 6 PM' for up to 10 minutes. Customers could book Helen on a day she wasn't working.
root_cause: biz._dataFetchedAt caches the Firestore fetch for 600,000ms (10 minutes). If admin updates schedule within the window, AI uses stale data. There is no push notification from admin to invalidate the cache immediately.
expected_behavior: When biz._dataFetchedAt is older than 600,000ms, _fetchLiveBizData() is called before answering. Within the 10-min window, old schedule is used — this is a known limitation.
known_limitation: 10-minute stale window is accepted. Admin-triggered real-time refresh (Firestore onSnapshot) is not yet implemented.
mitigation: 10-minute auto-refresh is in place. For immediate updates, vendor must wait up to 10 minutes or reload the customer chat page.
